scope.summary: Repoint skillExamples.skillsDir to .kiro/skills and wire the harness:check structural entry point so readiness gates run against the Kiro runtime layout.
goals: skillExamples.skillsDir resolves to .kiro/skills under the Kiro runtime
npm run harness:check delegates to the engine-aware structural wrapper (no-op pass while engine=none)
check-skill-examples validates the required core skills under the new dir
nonGoals: Enabling a real structural engine (still gated by ADR-0003)

acceptance.description: npm run harness:check exits 0 as an engine-aware no-op while structuralTest.engine=none.
check-skill-examples resolves skillsDir=.kiro/skills and validates the required core skills + example files.
